without_skill: Agent took before screenshots by default when the user only asked for dashboard screenshots — the skill's after-only default is a clear improvement.
Agent forgot to restart Grafana after git stash, leading to a stale before screenshot. The skill prevents this by explicitly documenting the restart step.

overall_feedback: All three test cases pass with the skill active and no human review issues were found. The skill is clear, actionable, and prevents common mistakes (wrong default mode, stale Grafana cache). No iteration-2 is needed.
